message:
chore(gitignore): exclude beads viewer (bv) local config and caches

Add `.bv/` to the project gitignore to prevent beads viewer local
configuration and cache files from being accidentally committed.

The beads viewer (bv) is a companion tool used for analyzing and
visualizing beads data (see the existing `.beads/` directory which
stores the project's beads database, daemon logs, and metadata).
Similar to how `.beads/` has its own internal gitignore for runtime
artifacts like `daemon.log`, this change ensures the bv tool's
user-local config and caches remain untracked.

This follows the pattern established in commit bbd443f which added
`.beads/.gitignore` for daemon logs, and aligns with the project's
approach of keeping runtime/tool-generated artifacts out of version
control while maintaining the core beads configuration in the repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,3 +18,6 @@ crates/scriptbots-render/frames_render_test/*.png
 *.png
 /tmp/
 /logs/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
